PROOF OF SERVICE OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR OST ON HEARING ON NOTICE OF MOTION TO COMPEL 1) WRITTEN DISCOVERY RESPONSES FROM DEFT 2) TO HAVE REQEUSTS FOR ADMISSIONS DEEMED ADMITTED; 3) TO COMPEL DEFTS APPEARANCE AT DEPOSITION; AND 4) FOR MONETARY SANCTION AND MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA , BY AND THROUGH DENNIS J. HERRERA, CITY ATTORNEY FOR THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SERVED DEC-20-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT POPE, MARK R

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA , BY AND THROUGH DENNIS J. HERRERA, CITY ATTORNEY FOR THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

DISCOVERY 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING REGARDING PLAINTIFFS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO & PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL 1) WRITTEN DISCOVERY RESPONSES FROM DEFENDANT 2) TO HAVE REQEUSTS FOR ADMISSIONS DEEMED ADMITTED 3) TO COMPEL DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE AT DEPOSITION AND 4) FOR MONETARY SANCTION. IT APPEARS THAT NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED; THEREFORE, THE COURT IS PREPARED TO ENTER AN ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THE PROPOSED ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO WITH THE EXCEPTION THAT DEFENDANT HAS FIVE DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER TO FILE FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES TO THE PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS NUMBERS 1-15 REGARDING THE GENUINESS OF DOCUMENT AND REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS NUMBERS 1-22. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO FILE SUCH RESPONSES THE GENUINESS OF DOCUMENT WILL BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND THE FACTS ASSERTED IN REQUESTS NUMBERS 1-22 SHALL BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND DEFENDANT WILL BE PRECLUDED FOR INTRODUCING ANY EVIDENCE TO THE CONTRARY. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 WILL BE IMPOSED AGAINST DEFENDANT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PROTEM: PAUL RENNE, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-12-2013 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2013 Continued To Aug-12-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel 1) Written Discovery Responses From Deft 2) To Have Reqeusts For Admissions Deemed Admitted; 3) To Compel Defts Appearance At Deposition; And 4) For Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Jan-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: CELIA LEE, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3800, FOR PLAINTIFFS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO & PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA; NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

DEFENDANT IS deemed to have stipulated that the motion will be decided by the Pro Tem Judge with the same authority as a Superior Court Judge.

RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING REGARDING PLAINTIFFs CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO & PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel 1) Written Discovery Responses From Defendant 2) To Have Reqeusts For Admissions Deemed Admitted 3) To Compel Defendant's Appearance At Deposition And 4) For Monetary Sanction. IT APPEARS THAT NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED; THEREFORE, THE COURT IS PREPARED TO ENTER AN ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THE PROPOSED ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO WITH THE EXCEPTION THAT DEFENDANT HAS FIVE DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER TO FILE FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES TO THE PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS NUMBERS 1-15 REGARDING THE GENUINESS OF DOCUMENT AND REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS NUMBERS 1-22. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO FILE SUCH RESPONSES THE GENUINESS OF DOCUMENT WILL BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND THE FACTS ASSERTED IN REQUESTS NUMBERS 1-22 SHALL BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND DEFENDANT WILL BE PRECLUDED FOR INTRODUCING ANY EVIDENCE TO THE CONTRARY. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 WILL BE IMPOSED AGAINST DEFENDANT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge ProTem: PAUL RENNE, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
